  "videoTitle": "Understanding Chords and Their Functions",
  "content": "Learn about the basics of chords and their roles in music.",
  "bullets": [
    "Chords are groups of notes played together.",
    "They create harmony in music.",
    "Different chords serve different functions.",
    "Common types include major, minor, and diminished chords.",
    "Understanding chords enhances your playing and composition skills."
  ]
}
